/usr/bin/ar qc liblockscreen-lib.a "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/BackgroundSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/CofView.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/KylinUserPromptView.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/KylinLockScreenShield.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenController.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenBaseShield.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenButton.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenSettings.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenShield.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenShieldFactory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenPanel.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenPromptFactory.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenAcceleratorController.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/LockScreenAccelerators.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/ScreenSaverDBusManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/SuspendInhibitorManager.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/UserAuthenticatorPam.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/lockscreen-lib.dir/UserPromptView.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib liblockscreen-lib.a
